# Managing Trusted Devices

At Acme Shop, managing your trusted devices is vital for protecting your account security. Users can access the 'Trusted Devices' section in 'Security Settings' under 'Account Settings' to view and manage the devices they trust. This list shows device details and allows users to remove any unrecognized devices if needed, prompting additional security steps for future logins from those devices. For suspected unauthorized access, it is recommended to change your password and remove all trusted devices, with customer support available for assistance.

[Source: account_security.md#managing-trusted-devices]
